name: @almamesh/frontend
//overrides: Force a single fresh caniuse-lite across the tree: autoprefixer + browserslist otherwise each pin their own nested (stale) copy, which trips the 'caniuse-lite is N months old' build notice even after `update-browserslist-db`. Refresh both this range and the DB periodically (a `bunx update-browserslist-db@latest` step in release/CI keeps it current).
